title: The Shell
text:
a demo


Code
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

r = np.arange(0, 2, 0.01)
theta = 2 * np.pi * r

fig, ax = plt.subplots(subplot_kw={'projection': 'polar'})
ax.plot(theta, r)

ax.set_rticks([0.5, 1, 1.5, 2])
ax.grid(True)

plt.show()

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

r = np.arange(0, 2, 0.01)
theta = 2 * np.pi * r

fig, ax = plt.subplots(subplot_kw={'projection': 'polar'})
ax.plot(theta, r)

ax.set_rticks([0.5, 1, 1.5, 2])
ax.grid(True)

plt.show()
